About Swavant

Built around a real creator community.

Swavant is a TikTok creator network and talent agency: community, competitions, and creator support come first. We also run TikTok Shop enablement, commission structuring, and brand campaigns for creators who want to turn content into income.

The Swavant team.

What we believe

Creator-first

Every decision starts with what's good for the creator, whether that's a battle, a brand deal, or just a place to belong.

Transparent

Creators see their commission and GMV in real time. Brands see exactly what they're paying for.

Selective

We would rather manage 250 creators well than 2,500 creators poorly.

Life at Swavant

On the ground, at every summit, launch, and night out.

Want to work with us?

Reach out, whether you create or you sell.
